Enchilada Combo Meals
Enchiladas Verdes - Full Tray
30 Shredded chicken enchiladas simmered in a light tomatillo cream sauce, topped with crema, cotija, and cilantro. Bright, tangy, and crowd-pleasing — a fresh balance of flavor and comfort.
Includes ½ tray of rice and ½ tray of refried black beans. Serves 12–15.$165
$165

Includes ½ tray of rice and ½ tray of refried black beans. Serves 12–15.

Enchiladas de Mole - Full Tray
30 Shredded chicken tinga enchiladas in our house-made mole — a deep, complex sauce of chiles, nuts, seeds, and chocolate, finished with sesame and queso fresco.
Traditional, bold, and unmistakably Mexican. Includes 1/2 tray of Mexican rice & 1/2 tray of refried black beans$180
$180

Enchiladas de Cochinita - Full Tray
30 Slow-roasted pork enchiladas in a guajillo-tomato salsa, topped with queso fresco and pickled red onions.
Rich, slightly smoky, with that signature Yucatecan depth of flavor. Includes ½ tray of rice and ½ tray of beans. Serves 12–15.$175

meta.meta_description: Antiguo Lobo in Chamblee, GA. Antiguo Lobo rooted in authenticity but not stuck in the past. Elevated agave spirits and classic flavors are reimagined and remixed for a modern edge.
